name: HSBC Premier Credit Card

specialSpendRules.notes: User-verified rule: rewards allowed on rent up to Rs 1 lakh
User-verified rule: rewards allowed on insurance up to Rs 1 lakh

exclusions: transactions excluded under HSBC Premier Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: Annual renewal fee waived for customers meeting HSBC Premier eligibility criteria
additionalBenefits: 20,000 reward points when starting to use the card, subject to terms
3 reward points per Rs 100 on eligible spends
Up to 12X reward points on hotels, flights and car rentals on Travel with Points
1 reward point worth up to Re 1 at Apple online store and selected airlines
Instant 1:1 conversion to air miles and hotel loyalty points in HSBC India app
Unlimited domestic and international airport lounge access for cardholders plus 8 international guest visits
Buy one get one offers at BookMyShow
30% off dining bill up to Rs 1,500 with EazyDiner
1% fuel surcharge waiver on fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 4,000
Lost card misuse insurance cover up to Rs 3 lakh

salaried: Existing HSBC Premier customer; Premier criteria include salary account with net monthly salary credit of Rs 3 lakh
selfEmployed: Existing HSBC Premier customer; Premier criteria include average quarterly TRB of Rs 50 lakh
